transcript: The powers on the gods can not become over. Zanza This is probably not even the world. Even gods are only limited by powers that are bound by the gods. Although great is not unlimited. The voice? Alvis?! How dare you disobey me?! I am Menada. But the time has come to begin with an end, for I will proclaim it. But that's impossible... Does this world belong to Zanza? Or does its belonging in you? That is something...I decided long ago! Nyeeeeah! Then we used all the powers of Fel-a-God And that deeds are destiny. Rrrrrrggghhh!!!
